Video.summary: Look at Franklin's unfinished autobiography, in which he created a persona for others to follow.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Age of Benjamin Franklin
Video.title: Benjamin Franklin and the American Dream

Image.alt: Benjamin Franklin and the American Dream
Benjamin Franklin and the American Dream
Benjamin Franklin and the American Dream

Video.summary: Meet Franklin's parents and siblings, learn the story of his wife and first-born son, and more.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Age of Benjamin Franklin
Video.title: Meet the Franklins

Video.summary: Delve into the Boston of the time to witness the events Franklin experienced in his youth.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Age of Benjamin Franklin
Video.title: Benjamin Franklin's Boston Beginnings

Video.summary: Discover how the city of Philadelphia shaped Franklin'and how Franklin shaped the city.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Age of Benjamin Franklin
Video.title: Benjamin Franklin and Philadelphia

Video.summary: How did the American West come into being, and how was it shaped by myth?
Video.grandparentTitle: The American West: History, Myth, and Legacy
Video.title: Westward the Course of Empire

Video.summary: To understand the American West, you have to understand the mark left by its earliest colonists.
Video.grandparentTitle: The American West: History, Myth, and Legacy
Video.title: The West in the Colonial Era

Image.alt: The West in the Colonial Era
The West in the Colonial Era
The West in the Colonial Era

Video.summary: After the Revolutionary War, how was land between the Appalachians and the Mississippi organized?
Video.grandparentTitle: The American West: History, Myth, and Legacy
Video.title: Venturing beyond the Appalachians

Video.summary: Follow the fascinating journey of the two explorers who mapped the Louisiana Purchase.
Video.grandparentTitle: The American West: History, Myth, and Legacy
Video.title: Discoveries of Lewis and Clark

Video.summary: See how Charlemagne's rule altered Europe and shaped his reputation for generations.
Video.grandparentTitle: Charlemagne: Father of Europe
Video.title: Charlemagne as Emperor, 800-814

Video.summary: The king's relations with his wives and children had long-lasting political repercussions.
Video.grandparentTitle: Charlemagne: Father of Europe
Video.title: Charlemagne as Head of Family and Dynasty

Image.alt: Charlemagne as Head of Family and Dynasty
Charlemagne as Head of Family and Dynasty
Charlemagne as Head of Family and Dynasty

Video.summary: Examine the common preconceptions about Celtic identity.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Celtic World
Video.title: Who Are the Celts?

Video.summary: Our earliest written records of the Celts come from Italy, Greece, and Spain.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Celtic World
Video.title: The Celts and the Classical World

Image.alt: The Celts and the Classical World
The Celts and the Classical World
The Celts and the Classical World

Video.summary: Archaeological studies of Celtic artifacts have woven a rich tapestry of their millennia-old society.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Celtic World
Video.title: Celtic Art and Artifacts

Video.summary: Discover how Celtic inscriptions on the coast of Spain suggests the development of a common language .
Video.grandparentTitle: The Celtic World
Video.title: Celtic Languages in the Ancient World

Image.alt: Celtic Languages in the Ancient World
Celtic Languages in the Ancient World
Celtic Languages in the Ancient World

Video.summary: Learn how combat against Celtic-controlled Gaul made certain locations a dangerous neighborhood for Romans.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Celtic World
Video.title: Caesar and the Gauls

Video.summary: Discover the ancient religious figures known as druids who served as holy men, soothsayers, and even lawyers.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Celtic World
Video.title: Celtic Religion and the Druids

Video.summary: Examine three key periods of U.S. intelligence before the birth of the CIA.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Agency: A History of the CIA
Video.title: Secrecy, Democracy, and the Birth of the CIA

Image.alt: Secrecy, Democracy, and the Birth of the CIA
Secrecy, Democracy, and the Birth of the CIA
Secrecy, Democracy, and the Birth of the CIA

Video.summary: Learn how the CIA transformed from an intelligence agency to housing a premier covert-action unit.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Agency: A History of the CIA
Video.title: George Kennan and the Rise of Covert Ops

Image.alt: George Kennan and the Rise of Covert Ops
George Kennan and the Rise of Covert Ops
George Kennan and the Rise of Covert Ops

Video.summary: Discover how the CIA failed to rein in the growing emphasis on covert operations.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Agency: A History of the CIA
Video.title: The CIA, China, and the Korean War

Image.alt: The CIA, China, and the Korean War
The CIA, China, and the Korean War
The CIA, China, and the Korean War

Video.summary: Ponder who was most responsible for Mohammad Mosaddeq's fall from power.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Agency: A History of the CIA
Video.title: The Iran Coup of August 1953

Video.summary: Start your journey with a closer look at why battlefields matter.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Civil War Battlefields
Video.title: The Power of Place: The Civil War in Context

Image.alt: The Power of Place: The Civil War in Context
The Power of Place: The Civil War in Context
The Power of Place: The Civil War in Context

Video.summary: Take a tour of Henry House Hill, where the Union line collapsed, then follow the Union retreat across the Stone Bridge.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Civil War Battlefields
Video.title: Manassas: The First Battle of Bull Run

Image.alt: Manassas: The First Battle of Bull Run
Manassas: The First Battle of Bull Run
Manassas: The First Battle of Bull Run

Video.summary: On June 25, 1862, Confederate General Robert E. Lee's newly christened Army of Northern Virginia launched a series of battles.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Civil War Battlefields
Video.title: The Seven Days' Battles

Video.summary: Go back to Bull Run for a second battle that saw the dazzling movements of Lee's lieutenants, James Longstreet and Thomas 'Stonewall' Jackson.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Civil War Battlefields
Video.title: A Return to Manassas: The Second Battle of Bull Run

Image.alt: A Return to Manassas: The Second Battle of Bull Run
A Return to Manassas: The Second Battle of Bull Run
A Return to Manassas: The Second Battle of Bull Run
